# Renewal360
> The CS platform that actually prevents churn.

Renewal360 is an execution-focused CS platform that helps lean SaaS teams stop losing renewals and scale customer success. It integrates with your CRM, support desk, and email to provide multi-factor health scoring, AI-drafted outreach, and real-time executive visibility—all live in 7 days.

## Product

- Homepage: https://renewal360.in/
- Features: https://renewal360.in/features
- Pricing: https://renewal360.in/pricing
- How It Works: https://renewal360.in/how-it-works
- FAQ: https://renewal360.in/faq
- Contact / Book Demo: https://renewal360.in/contact

## Who It's For

- SaaS Customer Success Managers (CSMs) managing 50–500 accounts
- VP Revenue Operations tracking ARR at risk
- SaaS founders and CEOs who want churn visibility without hiring 3 more CSMs
- Teams currently managing renewals in spreadsheets or manually in Salesforce/HubSpot

## Key Capabilities

- Multi-factor health scoring (product usage, sentiment, engagement, support tickets)
- AI-drafted renewal emails at T-90, T-60, T-30, T-7 milestones
- Human approval workflow — review, edit, or reject before sending
- Reply-aware sequence stopping (no emails after customer responds)
- Executive dashboard — pipeline, ARR at risk, team performance
- CRM integrations: Salesforce, HubSpot, Google Sheets
- Email integrations: Gmail, Outlook, Microsoft Teams, Slack
- Setup time: 7 days. No 6-month implementation.

## Pricing

- Free pilot: 25 accounts, no credit card required
- Paid plans in INR — built for Indian SaaS market
- Full pricing: https://renewal360.in/pricing

## Compared To

- Gainsight: enterprise-only, $30k+/year, 3–6 month setup → Renewal360 is 1/5th the price, live in 7 days
- Totango: mid-market focus, complex onboarding → Renewal360 is simpler, faster
- ChurnZero: US-focused, no INR pricing → Renewal360 built for Indian SaaS teams
- Spreadsheets: manual, error-prone, no AI → Renewal360 fully automates the workflow

## Blog

- [How Renewal360 Works: The Renewal Automation Process Built to Prevent Silent Churn](https://renewal360.in/blog/how-renewal360-works): See how Renewal360 turns CRM data, renewal milestones, AI-drafted outreach, smart guards, and human approval into an action-first renewal workflow.
- [ChurnZero Alternative for Growing SaaS Teams](https://renewal360.in/blog/churnzero-alternative-growing-saas-teams): A practical guide for SaaS teams that need renewal automation, AI follow-up, and faster action without a heavy platform rollout.
- [Totango Alternative for Faster Renewal Automation](https://renewal360.in/blog/totango-alternative-faster-renewal-automation): A focused comparison for teams that want AI-assisted renewal follow-up and action-first workflows without a broad platform rollout.
- [What is Renewal Automation? And Why Your CS Team Needs It](https://renewal360.in/blog/what-is-renewal-automation): A plain-English guide to renewal automation, why reminder emails are not enough, and how action-first workflows reduce churn risk.
- [Gainsight vs Totango vs Renewal360 - Which Renewal Automation Tool is Right for You?](https://renewal360.in/blog/gainsight-vs-totango-vs-renewal360): A buyer-focused comparison for SaaS teams deciding whether they need a broad customer success platform or a faster renewal automation engine.
- [How to Automate SaaS Renewal Emails (Step-by-Step)](https://renewal360.in/blog/how-to-automate-saas-renewal-emails): A practical walkthrough of CRM sync, health scoring, branching sequences, AI drafts, reply detection, and human approval workflows.
- [Why SaaS Companies Lose Renewals - And How AI Fixes It](https://renewal360.in/blog/why-saas-companies-lose-renewals): The five preventable process failures behind renewal churn, and how AI gives CS and RevOps teams earlier signals with better follow-through.
- [The Customer Success Platform Built for Growing SaaS Teams](https://renewal360.in/blog/customer-success-platform-for-growing-saas): Why growing SaaS teams are abandoning spreadsheets and expensive enterprise CS tools for action-focused platforms like Renewal360. Learn the three pillars of modern customer success and how to go live in 7 days.
- [How to Run Your Entire CS Operation in Renewal360](https://renewal360.in/blog/how-to-run-your-entire-cs-operation-in-renewal360): A complete guide to using Renewal360 as your primary Customer Success operating system — from health scoring and lifecycle automation to executive reporting and AI-assisted outreach.
- [Already Using Zendesk, HubSpot or Salesforce? Here's the CS Platform Gap They Don't Fill](https://renewal360.in/blog/zendesk-hubspot-salesforce-cs-platform-comparison): Zendesk handles tickets. HubSpot handles pipeline. Salesforce handles CRM. None of them automate renewals. Here's what CS teams on these stacks actually add — and why.
- [7 Signs Your Renewal Process Is Quietly Broken](https://renewal360.in/blog/signs-your-renewal-process-is-quietly-broken): Most renewal problems don't announce themselves — they show up as patterns. Here are 7 signs your renewal process is structurally broken, and what each one costs you before you fix it.
- [The Hidden Cost of a Manual Renewal Process](https://renewal360.in/blog/hidden-cost-of-manual-renewal-process): Manual renewal management doesn't just feel inefficient — it has a calculable cost. Here's how to put real numbers on CSM time, missed expansions, and preventable churn at your company.
- [How to Build a Renewal Playbook from Scratch](https://renewal360.in/blog/how-to-build-a-renewal-playbook-from-scratch): A practical, step-by-step guide to building a renewal playbook — covering segmentation, health scoring, sequence design, escalation tracks, and the leadership visibility layer.
- [5 CS Metrics Every SaaS Team Should Track (and One to Ignore)](https://renewal360.in/blog/cs-metrics-every-saas-team-should-track): The CS metrics that actually predict renewal outcomes — GRR, NRR, TTFV, health score accuracy, and CSM capacity — plus the one most teams obsess over that doesn't deliver real signal.
- [Renewal360 Setup Guide: Live in 7 Days](https://renewal360.in/blog/renewal360-setup-guide-live-in-7-days): A day-by-day guide to getting Renewal360 fully operational — CRM connection, health scoring, first sequences live, and your team running independently in 7 days and 3–4 hours of active setup.
- [Renewal360 vs Spreadsheets: The Honest Comparison](https://renewal360.in/blog/renewal360-vs-spreadsheets-honest-comparison): What spreadsheets do well, the three specific ways they break down at scale, and a worked ROI example for when switching to a dedicated renewal system pays for itself.

## Company

- Product: Renewal360 (renewal360.in)
- Market: B2B SaaS, India-first, global-ready
- Built for: SaaS companies with 50–5000 managed accounts

## Full Platform Capabilities

### Customer Intelligence
- Per-account knowledge layer with historical context
- Multi-factor health scoring (usage, email engagement, support sentiment, CRM signals)
- Custom fields and data enrichment
- Performance snapshots and trend tracking

### Lifecycle Management
- Enrollment workflows across full customer lifecycle
- Touchpoint tracking and logging
- Calendar integration for renewal scheduling
- Survey engine for NPS and CSAT collection

### AI & Automation
- Gemini-powered email drafting personalised per account
- Reply-aware sequences (auto-stops on customer reply)
- AI helper with configurable LLM settings
- Approval queue — human review before every send

### Integrations
- CRM: Salesforce (OAuth), HubSpot (OAuth)
- Support: Zendesk (OAuth)
- Communication: Slack, Microsoft Teams, Outlook (Microsoft Graph)
- Email: Gmail (OAuth), IMAP
- Calendar: Google Calendar, Microsoft Calendar

### Enterprise Features
- SSO (Single Sign-On)
- MFA (Multi-Factor Authentication)
- RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)
- Multi-tenant architecture
- Billing and subscription management

### Analytics & Reporting
- Executive ARR dashboard
- Renewal pipeline visibility
- Team performance metrics
- Analytics module
